# Revenue Model

> Polaris operates under the design philosophy that value generated throughout the protocol should not leak externally.

Canonical URL: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/revenue-model
Markdown URL: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/design/revenue-model.md
Section: Protocol Design

Documentation index: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms.txt
Full documentation bundle: https://polaris-finance.github.io/polaris-docs/llms-full.txt

---

Polaris operates under the design philosophy that value generated throughout the protocol should not leak externally. Following this, protocol revenue is generated entirely from activity taking place inside the Polaris ecosystem.

Creating pAssets, trading through the bonding curve, opening Reserve Loans, building on top of pETH and future protocol primitives all contribute to the same revenue engine.

The fees generated by these activities are routed back through the bonding curve to strengthen pETH, increase its floor and distribute yield through pETH flows.

Every fee generated by the protocol first strengthens the collateral layer before being distributed across the ecosystem, allowing the same economic activity that generates value to reinforce the foundation supporting Polaris.

## Revenue Through Flows

Both pETH flows and pAsset flows are designed to become valuable yield sources for the entire Polaris ecosystem.

These flows can be directed to pAsset markets, integrations, applications, liquidity venues and other approved recipients, with the vePOLAR stewardship ultimately determining all of this.

As adoption grows, the value of these flows grows alongside it, giving external protocols a direct incentive to build on Polaris while contributing to its growth.

Further details on flows are covered in the dedicated Flows section of this documentation.

## How Polaris Earns

Polaris participates in the same economic model as every other participant. To receive protocol revenue, treasury-held POLAR must first be locked as vePOLAR.

There are no protocol fees routed directly to an equity entity and no hidden offchain fees. Value generated by the system remains onchain, strengthening pETH before becoming available through the same mechanisms used by every other participant.

Therefore, vePOLAR revenue follows the same principle, with vePOLAR holders receiving a share of the interest paid by pAsset minters.

This keeps value creation and value distribution economically aligned, ensuring that every participant contributes to the system before receiving the value it generates.
